title: Sales Representatives of Services, Except Advertising, Insurance, Financial Services, and Travel
description: Sell services to individuals or businesses. May describe options or resolve client problems.

tasks.text: Answer customers' questions about services, prices, availability, or credit terms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend sales or trade meetings or read related publications to obtain information about market conditions, business trends, regulations, or industry developments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute and compare costs of services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with clients after sales or contract signings to resolve problems and provide ongoing support.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contact prospective or existing customers to discuss how services can meet their needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create forms or agreements to complete sales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop sales presentations or proposals to explain service specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Distribute promotional materials at meetings, conferences, or trade shows.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Emphasize or recommend service features based on knowledge of customers' needs and vendor capabilities and limitations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify prospective customers using business directories, leads from clients, or information from conferences or trade shows.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform customers of contracts or other information pertaining to purchased services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain customer records using automated systems.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor market conditions, innovations, and competitors' services, prices, and sales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Negotiate prices or terms of sales or service agreements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Quote prices, credit terms, contract terms, or fulfillment dates for services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
